description: Enable admins to invite members, change roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.

userStories.title: Add membership invitation and audit event persistence
userStories.description: As a system, I want storage for invitations and membership audit events so that member-management actions are durable and traceable.
acceptanceCriteria: Database schema includes membership invitations and membership audit event records
Audit events can store actor, target member, action type, and timestamp
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin invite-member operation
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to invite a member by email so that I can grant workspace access without direct database edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only backend operation accepts workspace id and invitee email
Successful invite creates an invitation record
Invite action writes a membership audit event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin member role-change operation
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles between viewer, editor, and admin so that permissions stay aligned with responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only backend operation updates member role to viewer, editor, or admin
Invalid roles are rejected
Role-change action writes a membership audit event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Implement admin revoke-access operation
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to revoke a member's workspace access so that former collaborators no longer retain permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only backend operation revokes selected member access
Revoked member no longer appears in active workspace membership
Revoke action writes a membership audit event
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add workspace settings member-management controls
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want invite, role-change, and revoke controls in workspace settings so that I can manage membership from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings shows an invite form by email
Each member row exposes role selection for viewer, editor, and admin
Each member row includes revoke access action
UI actions call the corresponding member-management operations
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in workspace settings
userStories.description: As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can audit invites, role updates, and revocations.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings includes a recent membership changes view
View lists action type, actor, target member, and timestamp
List is ordered by newest first
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
